name: publisher_dual_id
description:
Synthetic EPUB modelling the publisher dual-id footnote scheme that bit edward2016orientalism (Said, Orientalism): each definition is

1. text

and the in-text marker is . The note is addressable by TWO ids — the

's own publisher id (PUB001, which nothing references) AND the child anchor id (fn1, the marker target). ClassPatternFootnoteDetector used to register BOTH, making every note a duplicate definition of the same

; only the child-anchor copy could win the marker, orphaning the other (835 defs for 414 notes => 414/835 matched). Locks in the register-once fix (prefer child-anchor id, fall back to the element's own id).
